items.title: Logo uses logo.webp in favicon and header
steps: 1. View source of the live page; check the <link rel=icon> href
2. Load /logo.webp directly
3. Open the dashboard and the wizard; confirm the header mark renders
items.expected: Favicon and header both reference /logo.webp; the asset serves (200)
items.evidence: Live HTML favicon = /logo.webp; logo.webp built into dist and served; 3 header refs + favicon repointed from logo.png. File moved dist/ -> public/ so it survives rebuilds.

items.title: One shared ThinkingLoader wired at every loading state + ~50 Dave messages
steps: 1. Confirm BatchThinking, LoadingLine, and the triage gauge are removed
2. Confirm QuestionBatch, Dashboard, and TriageBranch all render ThinkingLoader
3. Grep the live bundle for the message pool + loader styles
items.expected: Single loader component; old loaders gone; Dave copy + .thinking-loader styles in the live bundle
items.evidence: BatchThinking.tsx + LoadingLine.tsx deleted; triage gauge removed; 3 call sites use ThinkingLoader; live JS contains the Dave copy; live CSS has .thinking-loader (14 refs). tsc/lint/build clean.
items.notes: lib/loadingMessages.ts holds 50 messages (mostly Dave), shuffled per mount.

items.title: Loader renders correctly: orb spins, copy rotates, triage resolves to a green check
items.precondition: A session mid-feature-scope (to see batch/triage loaders) on the live site
steps: 1. Start a new session and trigger triage; watch the loader
2. Generate a batch; watch the loader
3. Confirm the orange orb spins, the title swaps lines, and triage ends on a green check
items.expected: Animated orb + rotating serif copy everywhere; triage settles on the green check
items.notes: Component + CSS are correct and shipped; the animation itself was not eyeballed in a browser (reliable screenshots are unavailable in this environment). Quick visual confirm on the live site.

items.title: DELETE /sessions/:id is owner-scoped, returns 200 then 404, cascades children
steps: 1. POST /api/sessions to create a throwaway session
2. DELETE /api/sessions/:id
3. GET /api/sessions/:id
items.expected: DELETE -> 200 { id }; subsequent GET -> 404; foreign/missing -> 404; children removed by cascade
items.evidence: Live: created id=8 -> DELETE 200 {"id":8} -> GET 404. Backend suite 185 tests incl. 6 new delete cases (model returns 1/0 + cascade; controller 200/404 own+foreign). check:conventions --strict: 0 hard violations.

items.title: Dashboard row Delete -> inline confirm -> row removed
items.precondition: At least one session in the list on the live site
steps: 1. Click Delete on a row
2. Confirm the row shows Confirm delete + Cancel
3. Click Confirm delete
4. Confirm the row disappears and a 'Session deleted' toast shows
items.expected: Two-step confirm; on confirm the row is gone and the list refetches
items.evidence: Endpoint proven live (T3); useDeleteSession invalidates ["sessions"]; 'Confirm delete' present in live bundle; wiring compiles.
items.notes: Click-through not driven in a browser. Endpoint + wiring verified; quick confirm on the live site.

items.title: Dashboard New session button is the accent (orange)
steps: 1. Open the dashboard
2. Inspect the New session button computed background-color
items.expected: background-color is the accent #ff751f with near-black text
items.evidence: Local preview computed style: background-color rgb(255, 117, 31) (= #ff751f), color rgb(8, 9, 13). No console errors on mount.

items.title: Row Resume/Finish button is white with black text
items.precondition: At least one resumable session in the list
steps: 1. Open the dashboard with a resumable session
2. Inspect the Resume button computed colors
items.evidence: .light-button shipped in live CSS (5 refs); SessionList uses it for Resume/Finish. Not rendered locally (no session rows without the backend).
items.notes: Quick confirm on the live site once a session exists.

items.title: (Rev 1) New session button shows a + (Plus) icon and stays orange
steps: 1. Open the dashboard
2. Inspect the New session button and its icon
items.expected: A lucide Plus icon precedes the label; button background is the accent
items.evidence: Local preview computed style: svg.lucide-plus 17x17, flex-shrink 0; button background rgb(255,117,31). No console errors.

items.title: (Rev 1) Dashboard row actions are compact lucide icon buttons; rows compacted
items.precondition: At least one session on the live site
steps: 1. Open the dashboard with sessions
2. Confirm each row's actions are icon buttons (Play resume / FileText view / RotateCcw re-run / Trash2 delete; Check/X on confirm)
3. Confirm the rows are denser than before
items.expected: Icon-only buttons with tooltips; resume white, delete quiet-to-red, confirm filled-red; rows compact
items.evidence: .icon-button system (is-resume/is-delete/is-danger) ships in live CSS; SessionList renders the lucide icons; row metrics reduced; dead .light-button/.danger-button/.session-delete removed.
items.notes: Not rendered locally (no session rows without the backend). Quick confirm on the live site.

items.title: (Rev 1) Carousel custom card selects on focus (prior option de-highlights); no overlap with the card above
items.precondition: A session reaching the question carousel on the live site
steps: 1. On a question, select an option (it highlights)
2. Click into the 'Something else' field
3. Confirm the custom card highlights and the previously selected option de-highlights
4. Select the option directly above the custom card; confirm it no longer visually overlaps the custom card
items.expected: Custom card highlights on focus with mutual exclusivity; selected card layers cleanly (z-10), no grow-overlap of the card below
items.evidence: onSelectOther threaded to the custom input onFocus (sets OTHER_OPTION immediately); selected-card scale fixed to 1 + z-10 + tamed glow + wider grid gap. tsc/lint/build clean.
items.notes: Needs a live session to eyeball; selection logic + layout fix are code- and build-verified.

items.title: (Rev 2) Header: logo enlarged to 40px, title reduced, logo renders
steps: 1. Open the dashboard
2. Inspect .wizard-logo and .wizard-title computed sizes
items.expected: Logo 40x40 (not collapsed), title smaller than before
items.evidence: Local preview computed style: .wizard-logo offsetW/H 40x40 (after matching the img width/height attrs to the 40px CSS - the 32/40 mismatch had collapsed width to 0), .wizard-title font-size 24px (was ~27px min).
items.notes: The attr/CSS mismatch would have affected the live build too; caught locally.

items.title: (Rev 2) Resume icon stays visible on hover; ticket generation uses the rotating loader
items.precondition: A session row (resume) on the live site; a completed session to draft a ticket
steps: 1. Hover the resume (Play) icon button
2. Confirm the glyph stays dark/visible on the light hover
3. Click Generate ticket; confirm the rotating ThinkingLoader shows (not a 'Generating…' label)
items.expected: Play icon visible on hover; ticket step shows the shared loader while generating
items.evidence: .icon-button.is-resume:hover keeps color #0a0b10 (ships in CSS); TicketStep renders ThinkingLoader while generate.isPending. tsc/lint/build clean.
items.notes: Needs rows/session to eyeball; CSS + code verified.

items.title: (Rev 2) Last-question pager control is a Submit check; action group right-aligned
items.precondition: A session reaching the question carousel
steps: 1. Navigate to the last question
2. Confirm the right control is a check (accent when all answered) that submits
3. Confirm the Submit answers / Stop and draft group sits at the right
items.expected: Last-slide check submits the batch; the action group is right-aligned
items.evidence: .carousel-arrow.is-submit (2 refs) + .step-actions.is-end (1) ship in CSS; canSubmit/onSubmit threaded. tsc/lint/build clean.
items.notes: Needs a live session to eyeball.

items.title: (Rev 2) No 'Ready for batch N' button - auto-advance to next batch or ticket
items.precondition: A session in feature scope on the live site
steps: 1. Answer batch 1 and click Submit answers
2. Confirm a loader shows (no 'Ready for batch 2' button)
3. Confirm it then shows batch 2's questions, OR the ticket view if the interview is complete - never an empty batch screen
items.expected: After submit it loads then shows the next batch's questions or the ticket view; the between-batches button is gone
items.evidence: useAutoAdvanceBatches generates the next batch after submit/resume; the between-batches GenerateBatchPanel is replaced by the loader (only batch 1 keeps the Start panel). Mutations setQueryData so state updates synchronously. tsc/lint/build clean.
items.notes: Needs a full interview run to eyeball the transition.
